mockupSuffix: Shot on Canon EOS R5 with 50mm lens, f/4 aperture. Controlled natural studio light, realistic aluminum frame joints, visible fabric weave, slight natural creasing, believable shadows, premium commercial product photography.
lifestyleSuffix: Shot on Sony A7III with 35mm lens, f/2.8. Natural daylight, lived-in event atmosphere, realistic booth wear, shallow depth of field, believable people and props, authentic event-documentary photography.
negativePrompt: No illustration, no CGI, no 3D render, no plastic texture, no warped logos, no oversaturated colors, no impossible geometry, no fake glossy surfaces.
